n_max=1.verdict: M3 trivializes under Reading B (chirality-pairing) only.  Under Reading A (n_fock-parity, the Paper 28 §QED-vertex reading), M3 does NOT trivialize at signature (3, 1) on the chirality-symmetric truncation -- the Lorentzian D_even - D_odd equals the Riemannian one because parity is n_fock-based and chirality-independent.  The L0 prediction is therefore CONFIRMED under Reading B and FALSIFIED under Reading A.  This refines the master Mellin engine domain partition: M3's trivialization at (3, 1) is convention-dependent.
